units.name: CleartextFhevmInstance SDK Core
units.description: Create packages/sdk/src/relayer/cleartext/ and populate it with all source files. Move handle.ts, encrypted-input.ts, eip712.ts, and types.ts verbatim from packages/playwright/fixtures/cleartext-mock/. Port constants.ts but remove the hardhat/deployments.json import — all addresses now come from CleartextFhevmConfig. Create cleartext-fhevm-instance.ts with the CleartextFhevmInstance class that implements RelayerSDK: generateKeypair and createEIP712 are async wrappers of the current sync impls; encrypt builds a CleartextEncryptedInput and calls add64 for each value (noting the Uint64 assumption TODO); userDecrypt adapts from positional args to single-object UserDecryptParams by mapping params.handles + params.contractAddress into handleContractPairs then running ACL permission checks and executor.plaintexts reads in parallel; publicDecrypt is unchanged; createDelegatedUserDecryptEIP712/delegatedUserDecrypt/requestZKProofVerification each throw 'Not implemented in cleartext mode'; getPublicKey/getPublicParams return null; terminate is a no-op. Create index.ts barrel exporting CleartextFhevmInstance, CleartextEncryptedInput, CleartextFhevmConfig, FheType, and FHE_BIT_WIDTHS. Update tsup.config.ts to add the 'cleartext/index' entry point. Update packages/sdk/package.json exports to add the './cleartext' condition with types and import fields. Move all unit tests from packages/playwright/fixtures/cleartext-mock/__tests__/ to packages/sdk/src/relayer/cleartext/__tests__/, updating import paths and renaming CleartextMockFhevm to CleartextFhevmInstance throughout.
acceptance: packages/sdk/src/relayer/cleartext/cleartext-fhevm-instance.ts compiles without TypeScript errors and satisfies the RelayerSDK interface structurally
pnpm --filter @zama-fhe/sdk run build succeeds and emits dist/cleartext/index.js and dist/cleartext/index.d.ts
packages/sdk/package.json exports map contains a './cleartext' entry with 'types' pointing to ./dist/cleartext/index.d.ts and 'import' pointing to ./dist/cleartext/index.js
constants.ts contains no import referencing hardhat/deployments.json or any network-specific address literal
CleartextFhevmInstance constructor is synchronous — no static factory method
generateKeypair(), createEIP712(), encrypt(), userDecrypt(), and publicDecrypt() are all implemented and do not throw unconditionally
createDelegatedUserDecryptEIP712(), delegatedUserDecrypt(), and requestZKProofVerification() each throw new Error('Not implemented in cleartext mode')
getPublicKey() returns null, getPublicParams() returns null, terminate() is a no-op
All unit tests in packages/sdk/src/relayer/cleartext/__tests__/ pass (handle computation, encrypted-input builder, EIP-712 types, and CleartextFhevmInstance method tests)
pnpm --filter @zama-fhe/sdk run typecheck passes with zero errors

units.name: Playwright Fixture Migration to SDK Cleartext
units.description: Update packages/playwright/fixtures/fhevm.ts to import CleartextFhevmInstance from @zama-fhe/sdk/cleartext instead of CleartextMockFhevm from ./cleartext-mock. Replace the factory/static create call with the synchronous new CleartextFhevmInstance(provider, config) constructor, reading addresses from the existing deployments.json and passing them as CleartextFhevmConfig. Replace the builder-pattern encrypt calls (createEncryptedInput then add64) with the RelayerSDK encrypt({ values, contractAddress, userAddress }) interface. Replace the positional-arg userDecrypt calls with the single-object UserDecryptParams interface. All five route handlers (/generateKeypair, /createEIP712, /encrypt, /userDecrypt, /publicDecrypt) and the CDN intercept for relayer-sdk.js remain. After updating the fixture, delete the packages/playwright/fixtures/cleartext-mock/ directory entirely.
acceptance: packages/playwright/fixtures/fhevm.ts contains no import from './cleartext-mock' or any subpath thereof
fhevm.ts instantiates CleartextFhevmInstance via synchronous new constructor passing a CleartextFhevmConfig object
All five route handlers (/generateKeypair, /createEIP712, /encrypt, /userDecrypt, /publicDecrypt) are present in the updated fhevm.ts
The CDN route intercept for relayer-sdk.js remains present and unchanged
pnpm --filter @zama-fhe/playwright run typecheck passes with zero errors
Playwright E2E tests pass end-to-end against a running Hardhat node
